mapper.select: SELECT order_no AS orderNo, customer_name AS customerName, service_type AS serviceType, worker_name AS workerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(order_amount, 2)) AS orderAmount, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(paid_amount, 2)) AS paidAmount, order_status AS orderStatus, order_status_type AS orderStatusType, fulfillment_status AS fulfillmentStatus, fulfillment_status_type AS fulfillmentStatusType, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM t_order ORDER BY created_at DESC
